capability_assertions.positive: Admitted service, package, and cloud/resource correlation decisions carry explanation evidence and agree with graph and readback truth.
capability_assertions.negative: Rejected and missing-evidence decisions remain provenance-only and never publish canonical graph facts.
capability_assertions.ambiguous: Ambiguous and stale replay cases stay visible without being promoted to current canonical graph truth.

fixture_intents.fixture_intent: deployable-service-admitted expects one explicit service/deployment graph relationship with reducer admission evidence
deployable-service-missing-evidence expects a service candidate without deployment repository evidence to stay provenance-only
package-source-admitted expects manifest dependency evidence to publish one package consumption truth row
package-source-ambiguous expects conflicting source hints to stay visible without ownership promotion
package-source-stale-replay expects an older package-source generation to stay stale and never appear as current admitted truth
cloud-resource-admitted expects supported cloud inventory identity to publish one canonical cloud resource
cloud-resource-rejected expects unsafe or conflicting cloud identity evidence to remain provenance-only
